comment -> internalPort: Communication between the server on the vm and website on the vm
comment -> vmCommsPort: Communication between the server on the host machine and server on the vm
comment -> webCommsPort: Communication between the server on the host machine and website on the vm
comment -> exposedPort: Connects the server to the outside world; should be exposed in your router's settings.
comment -> vmAccessPath: The path to the folder containing the main.js file in the VM
comment -> vBoxManageDirectory: Where the VBoxManage executable is located on the host machine
comment -> nodeDirectory: Where the nodejs runtime is located on the VM
